label: go

claimProbes.statement: Somatic activating mutations in the EGFR tyrosine kinase domain (exon 19 deletions, L858R) in NSCLC confer sensitivity to EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitors such as gefitinib.
EGFR kinase-domain mutations in lung cancer confer primary resistance to all EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitors, so EGFR-mutant patients should not receive TKIs.

rationale: Founding oncogene-addiction target in NSCLC; activating mutations predict TKI response, decades of approved agents.
